code:
struct Player {
    pos           // current physical translation (Vec2)
    prev          // previous physical translation (for interpolation)
    vel           // Vec2
    half          // half-extents (Vec2)
    aim           // Vec2 unit vector
    speed_mult    // 1.0 normal, run_multiplier, sneak_multiplier
    hp            // hit points — attacks subtract, respawn on 0
    iframes       // invulnerability timer (seconds) after being hit
    stamina       // 0.0–1.0, drains while sprinting, recharges otherwise
    noise         // 0.0–1.0, current noise level (affects enemy detection)
}

struct Tuning {
    max_speed
    accel
    friction
    light_range
    light_half_angle_deg
    light_intensity
    ambient
    camera_smoothing
    run_multiplier
    sneak_multiplier
    stamina_drain       // per second while sprinting
    stamina_regen       // per second while not sprinting
    stamina_regen_delay // seconds after stopping sprint before regen starts
    noise_sprint        // noise level while sprinting
    noise_walk          // noise level while walking
    noise_sneak         // noise level while sneaking
    noise_still         // noise level while standing still
}

fn default_tuning() {
    Tuning {
        max_speed: 280.0,
        accel: 3200.0,
        friction: 3600.0,
        light_range: 380.0,
        light_half_angle_deg: 60.0,
        light_intensity: 1.3,
        ambient: 0.08,
        camera_smoothing: 8.0,
        run_multiplier: 1.75,
        sneak_multiplier: 0.4,
        stamina_drain: 0.4,
        stamina_regen: 0.25,
        stamina_regen_delay: 0.8,
        noise_sprint: 1.0,
        noise_walk: 0.45,
        noise_sneak: 0.1,
        noise_still: 0.0
    }
}
